2196920.name: 究極大富豪（Ultimate Daifugo）
2196920.description:
Ultimate Daifugo: The Definitive "President" Card Game

Experience "President" (known as Daifugo in Japan) like never before! "Ultimate Daifugo" takes the classic card game everyone knows and supercharges it with an massive collection of house rules—from the classics to the chaotic.

Whether you are a casual player or a hardcore strategist, this app offers a fresh, intense experience you won't find anywhere else. Designed specifically for online play, you can battle against up to 4 players from around the world!

*** Note: This application is currently available in Japanese only. English localization is in progress. Thank you for your patience!

■ An Unrivaled Collection of House Rules

We haven't just included the standard rules; we’ve packed in everything from the famous to the obscure.

  • Classic Rules: Spade 3 Counter, 8-Ender (8-Cut), 7-Pass, 10-Discard, Jack Back, Revolution, Sandstorm, 4-Stop, 5-Skip, 9-Reverse, Coup d'État, 7-3 Revolution, 99-Car, Rokurokubi, Omen, Capital Fall (Miyako Ochi), Queen Bomber.

  • Unique & Chaos Rules: DEATH, Lucky Seven, Enhanced 8-Ender, Enhanced Jack Back, Joan of Arc, Nero, Face Card Breaker, Gekokujo (Upheaval), Cataclysm, Down Number*, Grand Revolution, Zombie, Arthur*, Supply Drop, Absolute Revolution. (* = Coming soon)

More rules will be added in future updates. Enjoy a version of President with infinite strategic depth!

■ Cross-Platform Online Multiplayer

Play together, no matter the device! "Ultimate Daifugo" specializes in seamless online battles for 2 to 4 players. Whether your friends are on iPhone, iPad, Android, Mac, or Windows PC, everyone can join the same lobby and play together.

Download now and aim to become the Ultimate President!
